creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 251696
fix build with llvm15+ on 13.2, 13.3 amd64, i386, add PAE option for i386

Can you please test this patch?

PAE option for ports:
emulators/virtualbox-ose-additions-legacy or emulators/virtualbox-ose-additions-nox11-legacy
and
emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod-legacy.
